js.category: async function getCategory(){return[{id:'wpcz',text:'今日推荐'},{id:'lpjp',text:'撸片精品'},{id:'meiridasai',text:'每日大赛'},{id:'rdsj',text:'吃瓜爆料'},{id:'lljx',text:'伦理精选'},{id:'xsxy',text:'学生校园'},{id:'tynd',text:'体育男大'},{id:'smtt',text:'色漫天堂'},{id:'whhl',text:'网红黑料'},{id:'ysyl',text:'看片娱乐'},{id:'cqdb',text:'超前点播'},{id:'qubk',text:'奇趣百科'},{id:'51yc',text:'51原创'},{id:'dyds',text:'短剧影视'}]}
js.home: async function getHome(p){p=p||1;try{let u=p==1?'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/':'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/page/'+p+'/';let r=await fetch(u,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}});let h=await r.text();let l=[];let a=/<article[\s\S]*?<a\s+href="([^"]+)"[\s\S]*?<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>[\s\S]*?(?:background-image:\s*url\(['"]?([^'"]+)|<img[^>]*src="([^"]+)")[\s\S]*?<\/article>/g;let m;while((m=a.exec(h))!==null){let i=m[1];let t=m[2].replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim();let c=m[3]||m[4]||'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png';if(t&&i&&!t.includes('广告')){l.push({vod_id:i,vod_name:t,vod_pic:c,vod_remarks:'吃瓜爆料',vod_play_from:'51视频'})}}return{page:p,pagecount:1232,list:l}}catch(e){return{page:p,pagecount:1,list:[]}}}
js.detail: async function getDetail(i){try{let b='https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net';let u=i.startsWith('http')?i:b+i;let r=await fetch(u,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}});let h=await r.text();let t='';let x=h.match(/<h1[^>]*class="post-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h1>/)||h.match(/<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>/);if(x)t=x[1].replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim();let p='';let y=h.match(/<meta[^>]*property="og:image"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"/);if(y)p=y[1];let v='';let d=h.match(/data-config='([\s\S]*?)'\s*>/);if(d){try{let c=JSON.parse(d[1].replace(/"/g,'"'));if(c.video&&c.video.url)v=c.video.url}catch(e){}}if(!v){let a=h.match(/(https?:\/\/[^"'\s]+\.(?:m3u8|mp4|flv)[^"'\s]*)/gi);if(a)v=a[0]}let l=v?'在线播放$'+v:'在线播放$'+u;return{vod_id:i,vod_name:t||'51视频',vod_pic:p||'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png',vod_remarks:'点击播放',vod_play_from:'51视频',vod_play_url:l,vod_content:'热门吃瓜爆料视频'}}catch(e){return{vod_id:i,vod_name:'51视频',vod_pic:'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png',vod_remarks:'加载失败',vod_play_from:'51视频',vod_play_url:'在线播放$'+i,vod_content:'加载失败'}}}
js.search: async function getSearch(k,p){p=p||1;try{let e=encodeURIComponent(k);let u=p==1?'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/?s='+e:'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/page/'+p+'/?s='+e;let r=await fetch(u,{headers:{'User-Agent':'Mozilla/5.0'}});let h=await r.text();let l=[];let a=/<article[\s\S]*?<a\s+href="([^"]+)"[\s\S]*?<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>[\s\S]*?(?:background-image:\s*url\(['"]?([^'"]+)|<img[^>]*src="([^"]+)")[\s\S]*?<\/article>/g;let m;while((m=a.exec(h))!==null){let i=m[1];let t=m[2].replace(/<[^>]*>/g,'').trim();let c=m[3]||m[4]||'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png';if(t&&i){l.push({vod_id:i,vod_name:t,vod_pic:c,vod_remarks:'搜索结果',vod_play_from:'51视频'})}}return{page:p,pagecount:1,list:l}}catch(e){return{page:p,pagecount:1,list:[]}}}
